An abstract class that represents an Agent implementing some flavor of the MCTS algorithm.

Node - Class in edu.bu.pas.uno.tree
A class for an arbitrary node in the game tree.
Node(Game.GameView, int, Node) - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.uno.tree.Node
 
Node.NodeState - Enum Class in edu.bu.pas.uno.tree
An enum describing the state of moves the current player can do.
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults - Class in edu.bu.pas.uno.tree
 
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults.DrawSingleCardIdxs - Class in edu.bu.pas.uno.tree
A class containing constants that index into the q-values of a Node when the current player does not have a legal move and has to draw a card.
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults.DrawUnresolvedCardsIdxs - Class in edu.bu.pas.uno.tree
A class containing constants that index into the q-values of a Node when the current player has to pick up a bunch of cards due to a bunch of unresolved "Draw XX" cards
NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults() - Constructor for class edu.bu.pas.uno.tree.Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults
